Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Kavacha (how to put/insert it in a kanti-mala)

Other · asked by user [] · 2010-10-06 · 4 answers
Haribol,

Im sorry for such a neophyte question but Id like to know how to put a kavacha in a kanti-mala (neckbeads). I have limited association with devotees locally and cannot ask around.
Thanks a lot for any help!
user [38] · 2010-10-07
Easier solution is to put it on a separate string.
user [33] · 2010-10-08
I was told to wear it separately.
user [248] · 2010-10-08
just restring your neckbeads, fishing line is good and cheap and sturdy
user [643] · 2010-10-08
take the beads off then put the kavacha on
